cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what upset Melanie during the National Championships. Let me read through the text again to find the relevant part. The passage mentions that Melanie entered the National Championships. She had the second fastest swim and the fastest run, but she came nowhere. Then it says, "I was following this man and suddenly we came to the sea. We realised then that we had gone wrong. I ended up cycling 20 kilometres too far. I cried all the way through the running." So, the problem here was that she and the man she was following made a mistake, leading her to cycle extra kilometers. That must have cost her the race. The key point here is that she made a mistake during the cycling part of the race, which is option C. Let me check the options again. Option A says she was tricked by another competitor. The text doesn't mention any trickery, just that she was following someone who went wrong. So A is probably not right. Option B is about letting her teammates down, but
